text: In this bright, orderly environment, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls and modern displays suggest a space dedicated to learning and innovation. Moving closer to the R+D exhibit, I am struck by the vibrant colors and thoughtful design. The themes of research and development make me reflect on the progress of technology and humanity’s quest to understand and shape the world. Here, I feel intellectually stimulated, aware of the possibilities that arise in the careful fusion of inquiry and creativity.
